title: OMEGA 卡牌冒险
description:
A thank-you letter to player friendsSince the development of several games over the past three years, we have had no funding, sponsorship, or manpower, but only a passion, effort, and sincerity in producing single player games.

In the game, we strive to improve the quality of the game for everyone as much as possible without external assistance or any additional technical support. All programs and issues are difficult to create and modify by one person. Therefore, our game may not be perfect and perfect at present, but we have done our best. At the same time, our personal savings have been fully invested in the development and production of the game. We cannot support the development of subsequent versions, so we cannot release them for sponsorship in advance, which includes two games (Omega Card Adventure and Dead Zone 2). At the same time, we also explain to all players that the current released version of the game has core gameplay, referred to as 1.0 Advance Edition.

We also promise that if the game can receive everyone's support and sales reach the subsequent development funds, we will immediately start the production of the official version. The official version will continue to upgrade the game graphics, enrich the gameplay, and strive to create a 3A level card game. At the same time, we plan to recruit manpower to develop a horror game simultaneously, and expect to launch it together with players after the end of the year.

Об игреA 3D version of the 'Kill Spire' strategy card game, with exquisite and delicate graphics and a strong atmosphere, far surpassing similar games. The gameplay retains the essence of card games while discarding complex and useless functions and systems. It is simple and easy to learn, without the need for players to spend time learning, researching, and strategizing. By matching cards that suit them, players can enjoy the game to the end. It's that simple.

FeatureDynamically constructed deck: Choose your cards! Unlock nearly a hundred different cards during the challenge, choose whether to add them to your deck, and use combinations to unleash unexpected effects, defeat enemies, and challenge to the end.

Different choices of maps: Each time the challenge begins, the map's route provides different choices. Should we choose high risk and high return, or proceed cautiously? Facing different enemies, choosing different cards, discovering different equipment, and dealing with random events!

Powerful equipment: In the map, you will find various black technology equipment that will produce powerful chemical reactions with your deck, allowing your combat power to soar. But don't be too demanding, it may cost you more.

OMEGA Card Adventure has completed its pre release version and currently has the following content:6 characters, each with unique attributes.

About 100 available cards.

More than 10 types of functional equipment that can be found.

More than 50 completely different battles.

About 10 mysterious events that can bring you help or cause harm.
description_short: Go to the Dead Zone and complete the challenge with a combination of cards. Of course, during the challenge, we will also provide various black technology equipment and explore various random events. As for the outcome of the event, it is entirely up to your own choice. OK ! Go ahead and have fun.
